name: generate_voiceover
description: Synthesise a voiceover audio file from text via Kling or Gemini TTS. Generation step — produces a file on disk; composition happens at render time.

output.description: Path to the generated voiceover audio file (plus duration metadata when --json)

params.name: text-file
params.description: Path to a file containing the script. Mutually exclusive with --text.

params.name: voice
params.description: Voice identifier (vendor-specific). For Kling: voice_id or alias from TTS_VOICES. For Gemini: prebuilt voice name (e.g. 'Kore', 'Puck').

params.name: model
params.description: Override the connector's default model for the chosen vendor

params.name: speed
params.description: Playback speed multiplier. Kling only; ignored for Gemini.

params.name: language
params.description: Language hint (e.g. 'en', 'zh'). Kling only; ignored for Gemini.
